profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Pittsburgh PA — STOLA territory; PPG is a global chemicals manufacturer, not energy sector. Channel mismatch flagged.

signals.signal_title: CIO Bhaskar Ramachandran recognized as top 100 CIO
signals.signal_description: Bhaskar Ramachandran, PPG CIO, recognized by CIO Magazine as a top 100 CIO for 2024, highlighting digital transformation leadership across PPG's global manufacturing operations.

signals.signal_title: FY2024 revenue $15.9B; restructuring program targets $175M savings
signals.signal_description: FY2024 net sales $15.875B, down ~4% YoY. Ongoing restructuring program targeting $175M in annual savings by end of 2025 through headcount and footprint optimization. IT consolidation part of savings program.
PPG continuing global rollout of SAP S/4HANA across manufacturing sites and regional operations. Microsoft 365 standardized globally. Cloud migration to Azure underway.

spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: CIO Bhaskar Ramachandran recognized as top 100 CIO. Active SAP S/4HANA global rollout. M365 standardized. Azure cloud migration. AI pilot programs in manufacturing quality control. Score 14 — just below ≥15 high-AI threshold.

enrichment_notes: Global paints, coatings and specialty materials manufacturer. HQ One PPG Place Pittsburgh PA (STOLA territory — channel mismatch flagged). FY2024 revenue $15.875B. EBITDA ~$2.27B. ~50,000 employees globally. M365 standardized. CIO Bhaskar Ramachandran (top 100 CIO recognition). CEO Tim Knavish (appointed Jan 2023). Active restructuring targeting $175M savings. SAP S/4HANA global rollout. Azure cloud migration in progress. AI maturity score 14 — near high-AI threshold. WWT angle: SAP/Azure modernization, manufacturing OT/IT convergence, network infrastructure for global sites.
